_comment: Species: Light Beast (光兽) from A World Worth Protecting. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Light Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of pure light 3 m, body is radiance incarnate
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 0 jin (light); true form is a sun
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by absorbing light; cannot exist in darkness
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: light_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
